label: Joy kind
description: Classifies a type of joy activity. Referenced by JoyGiverDef, JobDef, and ThingDef ingestible/building properties to categorize how a pawn fulfills its joy need.

titleRequiredAny.label: Title required (any)
titleRequiredAny.description: Royal titles of which the pawn must hold at least one for this joy kind to be accessible. Absent means no title restriction.

needsThing.label: Needs thing
needsThing.description: If true, this joy kind requires an associated thing (building or item) to be accessible before the activity can be assigned.
